signal: Graphic tees and darker thrift basics are trending as easy anchors for 90s-inspired outfits.
styling_tip: Balance the tee with baggy denim, a structured jacket, and either chunky sneakers or combat boots.

signal: Lightweight athletic jackets are being styled as everyday layers over simple base outfits.
styling_tip: Let the jacket be the color moment, then keep the base layer plain and repeat one jacket color in the shoes or accessory.

signal: Soft natural fabrics are showing up with functional pieces like belts, boots, and structured outerwear.
styling_tip: Pair flowy bottoms with a fitted top or cropped jacket so the silhouette stays intentional.

signal: Chunky sneakers and platforms are being used to make simple outfits feel more styled.
styling_tip: Use cuffed denim, a mini or midi skirt, or a cropped pant hem so the shoe shape stays visible.

signal: Low-key vintage accessories are trending as a way to make basics feel personal without overpowering the outfit.
styling_tip: Repeat the accessory color once elsewhere in the look, then keep the rest of the outfit simple.
